title: Connecting MDM To Neo4j
scope_summary: Runbook-style guide for configuring and verifying Neo4j connectivity for the MDM graph sync service. Covers runtime environment variables, AWS Secrets Manager, Azure Key Vault, local verification, and Fleet token handling.
key_constraints: NEO4J_USERNAME (Aura) must be mapped to NEO4J_USER before running the repo
Secret values must be populated by an operator outside Terraform state
Fleet tokens must be treated as secrets and rotated if exposed in terminal logs or chat
The MDM graph client uses the driver's default database (NEO4J_DATABASE is not used at runtime)
